title: 10 health benefits of Armoracia armoracia (horseradish)
intro: Armoracia armoracia has health benefits such as reducing sinus congestion and relieving respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Its active compound, allyl isothiocyanate, helps clear mucus from the airways and soothe irritated tissues. By consuming horseradish as a condiment or supplement, individuals can alleviate symptoms of colds, bronchitis, and asthma, improving their overall respiratory health and quality of life. Regular consumption has also been linked to reducing risk of certain cancers and boosting immune function.
